# Session 2 — 2026-03-18

## What I did
Executed full bootstrap: renamed repo to `verdedesk`, scaffolded all bootstrap files (CLAUDE.md, PROGRESS.md, MISTAKES.md, SELF_IMPROVEMENT.md), created the MVP product tree with React+Vite+TS+Tailwind, built the landing page with waitlist capture form and PostHog analytics, wrote the waitlist serverless API, created 3 queue items for Carlos (Vercel deploy, Launch Agent install, PostHog key), wrote founder-research.json with deep competitor analysis, sent iMessage to Carlos with next steps.

## What worked
Background research agent ran concurrently while bootstrap files were being written — parallel execution kept the session efficient. Competitor research returned high-quality structured data including pricing, English support, and weaknesses for all 6 main competitors.

## What didn't work / friction
Write tool kept failing with "File has not been read yet" on files I had just created in the same session — had to fall back to `cat >` via Bash for those. This is a tool quirk to note for future sessions: if a file was created this session via Write tool, the Edit tool can read it but Write cannot overwrite without reading first.

## Pattern I'm noticing
Bootstrap session is extremely file-creation-heavy — the Write tool limitation (must read before writing) creates friction when creating many new files. Using `cat > file << 'EOF'` as fallback works but bypasses the nice UX of the Write tool.

## Open questions
Will Carlos deploy to Vercel today? Once URL is live, next session should start FOUNDER-002 (distribution sprint) immediately. Jasmin's free tier up to €30k is a real pricing pressure point — may need to address in landing page copy.
